index.html.title: About
index.html.keywords: Koncept,AsciiDoc extension,AsciidoctorJ,description logic,SNOMED CT,clinical terminology,SVG badge
index.html.body: About Koncept AsciiDoc Extension AsciidoctorJ extension providing inline Koncept markup (k:ConceptName[]) with SVG badge rendering and auto-generated Referenced Koncepts glossary with description logic axiom display.

All of this content is automatically generated by Maven[1] on behalf of the project. Overview Document Description About[2] AsciidoctorJ extension providing inline Koncept markup (k:ConceptName[]) with SVG badge rendering and auto-generated Referenced Koncepts glossary with description logic axiom display. Summary[3] This document lists other related information of this project Dependencies[4] This document lists the project's dependencies and provides information on each dependency.
